---
title: "Report html"
date: "10/30/2020"
---

```{r batch-setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
source("../R/config.R")
source("../R/utils.R")
source("../R/data_loader.R")
source("../R/analysis.R")
source("../R/report.R")
config <- get_config()
```

```{r render-reports, include=FALSE}
farmers <- generate_all_reports(config, progress_fn = function(f) {
  message("Report generated: ", f)
})
message("All ", length(farmers), " reports complete.")
```
